title: Crosshair King
description:
Rule Your Aim. Dominate Every Game.Crosshair King is a premium crosshair overlay tool for Windows, built for serious FPS players who refuse to settle for default crosshairs.20 Crosshairs. 4 Categories. Total Control.Classic — Timeless crosshair shapes trusted by pros for years.
Pro / Competitive — Precision-tuned designs for ranked and tournament play.
Tactical — Crosshairs built for methodical, map-aware players.
Special — Unique styles to express your playstyle and stand out.Full Customization at Your Fingertips• Choose any color with full RGB control

• Adjust size, thickness, and opacity to the pixel

• Fine-tune X/Y position for perfect centering on any monitor

• 4 built-in presets: King, Sniper, Assault, Stealth

• Toggle settings instantly with the Insert key
Works Where Others Don'tCrosshair King overlays cleanly in Borderless Windowed Mode — the standard for competitive play. No game files touched. No bans. Just aim.Built for Competitors• Works with any FPS in Borderless Windowed Mode

Developed by PM7Productions — Rule Your Aim.
description_short: The ultimate crosshair overlay for competitive FPS players. 20 customizable crosshairs, 4 presets, works in any borderless windowed game. Rule Your Aim.
